name: Iced Cucumber Soup (Mf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and seed the cucumbers. Cut them into 1/4-inch dice and toss with salt. Set aside for 15 minutes.
2. Transfer the cucumber cubes to a sieve. Rinse under water and pat dry with towels.
3. In a bowl combine the cucumbers and yogurt. Gradually whisk in the olive oil, ensuring the yogurt absorbs it all. Add garlic clove and mint. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled. (If taking the soup on a picnic, chill first in a bowl, then transfer to a thermos.)
4. Before serving, remove garlic cloves. Stir the soup, thin with ice water if desired; adjust seasoning.
5. Ladle the soup into chilled plates. Stir in raisins, then garnish with walnuts and chives. Optionally, drop crushed ice into each plate before serving.
Yield: 4 servings
